name: safebrowse-ai
description: Privacy-first web safety extension with on-device heuristics, PIN-locked overrides, HTTPS alerts, and encrypted logs.

scripts.zip:webstore: npm run build:chromium && rm -f dist/extension.zip && (cd dist/chromium && zip -r ../extension.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' -x 'assets/store/*')
scripts.zip:chromium: npm run build:chromium && rm -f dist/chromium.zip && (cd dist/chromium && zip -r ../chromium.zip .)
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && rm -f dist/firefox.zip && (cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../firefox.zip .)
